index.title: Codex — 3D Design Studio · Hard Surface & Product Visualization
index.description: Codex is a remote 3D design studio specializing in hard surface modeling, product visualization, and game-ready assets. Built in Blender. Available worldwide.
index.ogDescription: Hard surface modeling, product viz, and 3D prototyping for global clients. Remote. Detail-driven. Blender-native.
index.twitterDescription: Hard surface modeling, product viz, and 3D prototyping for global clients.

fa.title: Free 3D Assets — Codex Studio · Hard Surface, Game-Ready, CC0
fa.description: Free 3D assets by Codex Studio. Hard surface models, game-ready props, and product renders. Free for personal and commercial use under CC0.
